title: View item from update notification
excerpt: Whenever you click on an update notification from within Monday (from the notification “bell” icon on the top right), it opens up the update panel on the right, but there doesn’t seem to be a way to view the item to whic…

posts.author: simone.steffen (Simone Steffen)
posts.cookedHtml: Whenever you click on an update notification from within Monday (from the notification “bell” icon on the top right), it opens up the update panel on the right, but there doesn’t seem to be a way to view the item to which the update is about - as a user, I want to be able to do that so that I can make changes to the item if needed (update its status, due date, etc). Is it possible somehow - am I missing something?
